title: Foundation: config/audit gate #1
purpose: Validate `MnemoConfig.swift` rejects cloud hosts, LAN binds, and backing-store mismatch at startup with tested exit codes 3/0.

title: Foundation: config/audit gate #2
purpose: Extend `LoopbackAudit.swift` to parse `lsof` output for Rivet/smfs edge ports; document in `mnemoctl audit` help.

purpose: Ensure `StackHealth.swift` aggregates ollama+engine+smfs with actionable unhealthy reasons.

purpose: Add version stamp to `MnemoCore/Placeholder.swift` from git tag or build flag — surface in `mnemoctl health`.

purpose: Harden `TOML.swift` parser against malformed `mnemo.toml` — fail closed with line numbers.

title: Config wire: [dreaming] enabled
purpose: Wire `[dreaming]` section into MnemoConfig and Consolidator scheduling.

title: Config wire: [dreaming] interval_hours
purpose: Expose dream interval; validate > 0 at startup.

title: Config wire: [privacy] show_egress_indicator
purpose: Drive privacy dot visibility from config.

title: Config wire: [ui] summon_hotkey
purpose: Load global hotkey from config instead of hardcoding.

title: Config wire: [ui] glass_prominence
purpose: Expose glass style token from config.

title: Config wire: [sla] sources_render_ms
purpose: Add automated test that sources render within SLA.

title: Config wire: [sla] first_token_ms
purpose: Wire bench thresholds to config validation warnings.

title: Config wire: [sync] queue_max
purpose: Enforce background sync queue cap from config.
